title: lycianthes glandulosa
intro: Lycianthes glandulosa, also known as the purple flowered lycianthes or purple flowers of the night, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lycianthes glandulosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
